scripts.contracts:sync: yarn --cwd backend generate:openapi && yarn --cwd frontend generate:api-types && yarn --cwd backend generate:ws-types
scripts.contracts:check: yarn contracts:sync && git diff --exit-code -- backend/generated/openapi.json frontend/src/generated/api-types.ts frontend/src/generated/ws-contracts.ts
scripts.lint: yarn --cwd backend lint && yarn --cwd frontend lint
scripts.typecheck: yarn --cwd backend typecheck && yarn --cwd frontend typecheck
scripts.test: yarn --cwd backend test && yarn --cwd frontend test
scripts.format:check: yarn --cwd backend format:check && yarn --cwd frontend format:check
